who: procurement managers in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify, processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent vendor performance tracking causes missed discounts and late orders. We compile vendor performance scorecards and email monthly summaries instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent vendor performance tracking leads to missed discounts and late orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Share insights on Indie Hackers about vendor tracking
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for procurement tools
try_it: Let users try monthly performance scorecard generation and manual input option for vendor data on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
